data.description: Refactor the three metadata record types (notes, handoff capsules, step history) to enforce a shared immutable model. These records must be append-only: corrections are represented by new follow-up records, never by editing or deleting existing records. This ensures agent-authored metadata remains durable and creates an auditable record of all changes. Additionally, establish a canonical typed interface for lease identity so the lease reference is consistent and strongly-typed across all metadata record types, eliminating ad-hoc per-record structures. Work includes designing the base interface/invariants, updating the schema, and enforcing immutability constraints in both creation and update paths.
